description_long: This is a large, roughly rectangular rock with a prominent, layered texture and wavy striations running horizontally across its surfaces. The coloration is primarily a mix of light gray, off-white, and darker gray bands, giving it a marbled appearance. The rock's surfaces are uneven, with some jagged edges and a generally rough, natural finish. One side features a visible red marking or paint, while another side has a small white label with measurement markings. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or openings. Its overall form suggests it could serve as a natural barrier or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A large, layered gray and white rock with wavy striations, rough surfaces, and visible markings. Its solid, dense form and irregular edges make it suitable as a natural barrier or landscape feature.
description_view_0: Tall, narrow side view showing pronounced wavy striations and a jagged top edge.
description_view_1: Flat, broad face with horizontal banding and a small white measurement label in the upper left corner.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the rock's pointed top and the continuation of the wavy striations.
description_view_3: Flat face with layered texture and a visible red marking or paint near the center right.
